import React, { useState } from 'react'; import GlassCard from '../components/GlassCard'; /** * Contact page with form and pharmacy information * Implements Requirements 16.1, 16.2, 16.3, 16.7, 16.8 */ const Contact = () => { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', email: '', phone: '', subject: '', message: '' }); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // TODO: Implement contact form API call console.log('Contact form:', formData); alert('Contact form functionality will be implemented in later tasks'); }; return (
{/* Contact Form */}
